title: ClearGate Sprint State v2
description: Schema for .cleargate/sprint-runs/<sprint-id>/state.json. schema_version=2 adds per-story lane fields (lane, lane_assigned_by, lane_demoted_at, lane_demotion_reason). Migrated from v1 on first read by update_state.mjs.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 2 for v2 state files. Bumped from v1 by migration in update_state.mjs.

execution_mode.description: Execution mode for the sprint. v1 = legacy sequential; v2 = worktree-parallel.

stories.description: Map of story ID to story state entry

last_action.description: Human-readable description of the last operation performed

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last top-level update

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the story

qa_bounces.description: Number of QA bounce cycles. Reaching 3 triggers auto-escalation.

arch_bounces.description: Number of Architect bounce cycles. Reaching 3 triggers auto-escalation.

worktree.description: Path to the story's git worktree checkout, or null if not in a worktree

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last update to this story entry

notes.description: Free-form notes for this story (escalation reason, QA comments, etc.)

lane.description: Execution lane for this story. Default 'standard'. Set by Architect at sprint design or via --lane flag.

lane_assigned_by.description: Who assigned the lane value. 'migration-default' for stories migrated from v1.

lane_demoted_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the story was demoted from fast to standard, or null if never demoted.

lane_demotion_reason.description: Human-readable reason for lane demotion, or null if never demoted.
